productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Black Shoes
description: Style NoteNeatly designed without fussy overlays, we love this Benetton shoe with its eye-for detail - the lace-ups match the upper and blend in beautifully with the rest of the upper. Fabric overlays add a hint of vintage interest in this modern shoe. Who can put a price on style? Buy this before we run out of stock!Product DetailsBlunt toed, casual sneaker in black with lace-up fasteningTextured synthetic leather upper with fabric overlays and stitch details at the seams of the toe boxPadded collar and tongue (with branding) and an ergonomically shaped insoleUpper adhered to the outsoleTPU outsole with patterned nubsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in sunlight
